publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-11-14 18:18:30 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, programs, pamphlets, photographs, memoranda, memorabilia, questionnaires, clippings, audiotapes, and other papers.
did.abstract: Records of the Class of 1937 Women's Secretary, Carol Cline, include correspondence, programs, pamphlets, photographs, memoranda, and memorabilia pertaining to reunions; questionnaires and other biographical information for each reunion; a guide for class secretaries, clippings, and other printed material; "Class of 1937 Women, History Since Graduation, 1937-1990," and tape recordings of the Women's Reunion Banquet and Midnight Dormitory Party (1962), Introduction to 1937 Banquet, and the 45th Reunion Banquet at the Johnson Art Museum. Also, questionnaires about the class, 1972-1991.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records of the Class of 1937 Women's Secretary, Carol Cline, include correspondence, programs, pamphlets, photographs, memoranda, and memorabilia pertaining to reunions; questionnaires and other biographical information for each reunion; a guide for class secretaries, clippings, and other printed material; "Class of 1937 Women, History Since Graduation, 1937-1990," and tape recordings of the Women's Reunion Banquet and Midnight Dormitory Party (1962), Introduction to 1937 Banquet, and the 45th Reunion Banquet at the Johnson Art Museum. Also, questionnaires about the class, 1972-1991. Class of 1937 class and reunion records; and reunion memorabilia, particularly "Flip the Frog" class mascot items.
Also contains files of Merle Ohlinger, including correspondence with Carol Cline. Reunion photographs (1947, 1957, 1962) and parody issue "Naval Day Nudes, May 23 1936."

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Class of 1937 (Women) records, #41-4-738. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Re: Mrs. Abendschein, Chaperone, Sigma Delta Tau; incl. photo of Mrs. A., correspondence with Mary Donlon
Letters to Dilly (Esther Dillenbeck Pruden), re: 25th anniversary gift for Carol Cline
Prof. John C. Adams, Shakespeare prof.
Helen E. Fry '37, mainly re: her service with the American Red Cross in North Africa and Italy
Margaret W. Thompson, Assistant to the Dean of Women, 1935-1940; 1944-1948 letters, with the American Red Cross in China
Miscellaneous correspondence since 1962, incl. letter from Edith M. Fox, Oct. 21, 1963
Correspondence with 1937 Women's Officers about Alumni News
Class of 1893 letter to class secretaries
Album of Cornell songs made for Cornell Alumni Assoc. (6 sides)
'39 button and ribbon, Elizabeth D. Stocking
Book, You Can Take Them With You, by Violet Brown Weingarten '35
Printing block, cut for banquet program, 15th reunion
Shoe cleaner, compliments of Ithaca Hotel
Postcard from Merle Ohlinger to Miss Marian Stevenson
Cowbow hat with button from 1952 reunion
"How to care for your wild rock"
V. U. centennial goblet in box
